body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

This is a **Management Plane Generator (MPG) migration tracking issue** for the `Azure.ResourceManager.CosmosDBForPostgreSql` SDK, part of the broader migration effort tracked in #53864.

The goal is to migrate the CosmosDB for PostgreSQL SDK from Swagger/AutoRest-based generation to TypeSpec-based generation using the Azure Management Generator.

<details>
<summary>📋 Issue Analysis</summary>

- **Type**: Internal migration work item (sub-issue of #53864)
- **SDK Package**: `Azure.ResourceManager.CosmosDBForPostgreSql`
- **SDK Location**: `/sdk/cosmosdbforpostgresql/Azure.ResourceManager.CosmosDBForPostgreSql/`
- **Status**: No `tsp-location.yaml` found — migration has not yet been started
- **Author**: Internal team member (`haiyuazhang`)
- **Parent Issue**: #53864 — Azure Mgmt Generator migration (parent tracking issue)

</details>

<details>
<summary>✅ Migration Checklist</summary>

- [ ] Locate the TypeSpec spec for CosmosDB for PostgreSQL in [azure-rest-api-specs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs) under `specification/cosmosdbforpostgresql/`
- [ ] Create `tsp-location.yaml` in `/sdk/cosmosdbforpostgresql/Azure.ResourceManager.CosmosDBForPostgreSql/`
- [ ] Run `azsdk_package_generate_code` to generate the SDK from TypeSpec
- [ ] Compare generated output with the existing AutoRest-generated SDK for breaking changes
- [ ] Apply any needed customizations in `src/Customize/` to mitigate breaking changes (see [mitigate-breaking-changes skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/SKILL.md))
- [ ] Run `dotnet build` to verify the generated SDK compiles
- [ ] Run `dotnet test` to verify tests pass
- [ ] Run `Export-API.ps1 cosmosdbforpostgresql` to update API listing files
- [ ] Update `CHANGELOG.md` with migration notes
- [ ] Open a PR and link to this issue

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔧 Debugging / Helpful Resources</summary>

- **MPG Migration Skill**: Use the `mpg-sdk-migration` Copilot skill for step-by-step guidance
- **Breaking Change Mitigation**: Use the `mitigate-breaking-changes` skill for patterns like `CodeGenType`, `CodeGenSuppress`, `@@clientName`, `@@alternateType`
- **TypeSpec Spec Location**: Check `specification/cosmosdbforpostgresql/` in [azure-rest-api-specs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs)
- **Similar Completed Migrations**: Review #55080 for examples of completed RP migrations
- **Parent Tracking Issue**: #53864

</details>

<details>
<summary>💡 Notes</summary>

- No `CODEOWNERS` entry was found for this service directory — `Service Attention` label has been added
- The `**` prefix in the title is a convention used in the MPG migration tracking issues to denote work items
- The existing SDK already has `api/`, `src/`, `tests/` folders — the migration will replace/update generated code in `src/Generated/`

</details>
